# command: find /etc/apt -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name "sources.list" -o -name "*.list" -o -name "*.sources" \) -print -exec sed -n "1,160p" {} \; 2>/dev/null || true

/etc/apt/sources.list.d/gitlab_gitlab-ce.list
# this file was generated for
# the repository at https://packages.gitlab.com/gitlab/gitlab-ce/debian/bookworm

deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/gitlab_gitlab-ce-archive-keyring.gpg] https://packages.gitlab.com/gitlab/gitlab-ce/debian/bookworm bookworm main
deb-src [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/gitlab_gitlab-ce-archive-keyring.gpg] https://packages.gitlab.com/gitlab/gitlab-ce/debian/bookworm bookworm main
/etc/apt/sources.list
deb http://deb.debian.org/debian bookworm main contrib

deb http://deb.debian.org/debian bookworm-updates main contrib

deb http://security.debian.org bookworm-security main contrib
